name: News Pulse
description_en: Fast attribution for stock-price moves: four parallel agents scout company events, regulation, competitors, and market sentiment, then judge whether the thesis needs a re-review.
description_zh: 股价异动快速归因：四角色并行侦察公司事件、监管政策、竞争对手与市场情绪，判断是否触发论文重审。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It deploys parallel agents to map a price-move timeline, identify the dominant cause, and recommend whether to reopen the investment thesis.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。部署并行代理绘制异动时间线、识别主导原因，并建议是否需要重新打开投资论文。
sec_note_en: Spawns background subagents and performs web searches for news and market data. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会启动后台子代理，并执行网络搜索获取新闻与市场数据。无需外部账号。
